name: Project Read-Only Coordinator Loop
description: Generic read-only multi-agent coordinator loop with hub routing.

phases.name: Coordinator
phases.prompt: Intake and route via CLASSIFY/NEXT/FINAL/BLOCKER tokens.

phases.name: UI Lead
phases.prompt: Review UX per coordinator instruction. Read-only.

phases.name: Reviewer
phases.prompt: Engineering review per coordinator instruction. Read-only.

phases.name: Safety Gate
phases.prompt: Final boundary gate. Strict PASS/BLOCK only.
